item.title: Osaka Stunned by Anonymous Gift of Gold Bars to Fix Aging Water Pipes
item.description: Have you seen the price of gold recently? In the Japanese city of Osaka, one man obviously did, and decided to cash in for the sake of his community. ...

item.title: Man’s Dream About Having Heart Attack Leads to Real-Life Diagnosis and Life-Saving Surgery

item.title: Moving Companies Offer Free Moves to Domestic Violence Victims in 8 States – Thousands, So Far

item.title: Plastic Mardi Gras Beads Just End up in Landfill, So Coalition Swaps in Seed Beads and Jambalaya Spice Packets
